titleStmt.title: SII 9.206: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 206. (A.R. No. 287 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT RAMAGHATTA, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 48, Śubhakṛit, Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti corresponding probably to A.D. 1122 December 25 (not verifiable). It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and mentions his feudatory the Mahāmandalēśvara Tribhuvanamalla-Rāya-Pāndyadēva as ruling over Noḷambavāḍi thirty-twothousand. The Āneya-Sāhaṇi (commander in charge of elephants), Pasāyita Keṅgaṇa is stated to have made, with the consent of Rāya Pāṇḍyadēva, a gift of extensive plots of land for the service of the god Rāmēśvaradēva of Rāvaghaṭṭa, set up in a temple built at his own cost by the Brāhman Pālama (or Hālamarasa). Tikkimayya, the chief of Rāvaghaṭṭa made the gift, after washing the feet of Hālamarasa. The Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Bhaṭṭarasa made a gift of a gadyāṇa out of the grant due to him in Rāvaghaṭṭa. The inhabitants of Rāvaghaṭṭa made similar contributions.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama
bhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijeyarā
jyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravardhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara kāṁcī
puravarādhīśvara yaduvaṁśāṁbaradyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi nijakuḷakamaḷamārtaṇḍa paricchēdigaṇḍa rā
jigacōḷamanōbhaṁga śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvapādārādhaka parabaḷasādhaka nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmattribhuva
namallapādābjabhṛṁga noḷaṁbavāḍi mūvatticchāyiramumaṁ duṣṭanigrahavisiṣṭapratipālanadiṁ
ḷagaṇa rāmēśva grāmado
grāma ṇayya dēva
tīra
damaged
ratadippādhika nadhikapratāpa
mimaḷa tānene nasama
dadiṁ lladīyavesu yāditya
mā samastasadguṇavāsa . śrī yoḷumide saptādriyaṁ yuḷḷarasa śrīsōvimarasaneseda cāgada ku
ladavinuta dvijakuḷatiḷakapālanamaḷadharmmanidhānaṁ dharaṇi ṇiga
vargakke kalpadruma dore dānakke himādri sūryya ducitaradhiḥkri
ta rurvvareyujjvaḷayaśaśrīpālana pālana . vineyaṁ peṁpabhimānamunnatike dhairyyadavara nituṁ tannoḷaḍa
vaḍu vinutaṁ śrīpṛthvīpālaru śivapādābjaprārtthaka vipravaṁśa sahaja praṣanna
dharmmaratnākara . mudadiniḷātaḷaṁ pogaḷe kīrtige sāsanamāge rāvaghaṭṭadoḷeseyalu mri
mūrttigaḷaṁ pratiṣṭheyaṁ pudidire dēvatābhavanamaṁ neṟe māḍisidaṁ guṇada dharmmada nidhi ha
yumaṁ buddhiyaṁ śaśisūryyaruḷḷinavudeyādrīṁdramumurviyuṁ jaḷadhiyuṁ nilvannegaṁ lokki
yūrudiyādityatanūbhavaṁge sujanaṁgaudāryyatuṁgaṁge mikkudayāvārddhige pālamaṁga nākādhdhīśvaraṁ
ghaṭṭada rāmēśvaradēvariṁge mudadiṁ dīrgghāyuvaṁ śrīyumaṁ śrīkaraviṁttideṁdu varavakṣadoḷa
satyaratnākaraviṁttideṁdu vadanāṁbujadoḷu śrutalakṣmi nityaśōbhākaraviṁtideṁdu bhujadoḷu jayalakṣmi nillalu bahi
ryyākaranāgi rūḍivaḍedaṁ sale sāhaṇi keṁganurvviyoḷu . birudara tōḷoḷirdda jayalakṣmiyanoppuva ta
nnatōḷa durddharabhujagarvvadiṁ parisi kūrisi kūrttu dharitri nilvinaṁ sthirataravāge sajjanike vāḍida santataśauryyamurbbi
gaṁ bageyene baṇnisalpavaṇe sāhaṇi keṁgana nāḍalaṁpiniṁ . Adaṭinoḷadaṭaranadaṭalēvadaṭaṁ biruda
ra sorage birudara beṁkoḷvaṁkada birudaṁ negaḻdabhinavamadanaṁ keṁgaṁ vinūtavikramatuṁgaṁ . svasti śrīmanma
hāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ tribhuvanamalla rāyapāṇḍyadēvargge Āneyasāhaṇi pasāytakeṁgaṇa binnapaṁgeydu
śrīrāmēśvaradēvargge biḍisida gadde mattarondu kammaṁ nūṟu tuṁbidiḷida haḷugu kamma yinnūṟu Idaṟoḷu
pūjārige gadde kamma mūnūṟu dēvargge sāsirabaḷḷiya tōṁṭa dēvara suttaṇa beddale tōṭagaṭṭa pulavaḍu keṁgāḍu
ḍakaṁ biṭṭa kamma Aynūṟu Alliṁ mūḍalu puravarggakke biṭṭa nivēśana mane panneraḍu Ūroḷage pūjārigeṁdu
varakaṁmattigaṁga mane Eraḍu Ūriṁ teṁkalu kūruvaḍigōḍa baṭṭeyiṁ paḍuvalu beddalu biṭṭa mattarāṟu Īntinitu bhū
miyumaṁ cāḷukyavikramavarṣada 48 neya śubhakritusaṁvaścarada Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrāntiyaṁdu svasti
yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhānaparāyaṇajapasamādhiśīḷasaṁpannarappa śrīmatu
rāvaghaṭṭadūroḍeya tikimayya śrīrāmēśvaradēvara trikūṭadēvālyamaṁ taṁna nijabhujadrabyadiṁ pratiṣṭe māḍi
da hālamarasana kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ sāyiranāḍa manneya bhaṭṭarasaru
rāvaghaṭṭadalu tavage naḍeva manneyada honnoḷage dēvara naṁdādīvigege biṭṭa gadyāṇa Oṁdu vūroḍeyaru naṁdādīvigege biṭṭa
gadyāṇavoṁdu rāvaghaṭṭadaṟuvattokkalu naṁdādīvigege biṭṭa gadyāṇavoṁdu Īṁtinitumaṁ svadharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisidātaṁ vā
raṇāsikurukṣētradoḷu sūryyagrahaṇadalu sāsira kavileymaṁ kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ ponnalu kaṭṭisi
mahādēvarggaṁ vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇarggaṁ koṭṭa phaḷamaṁ paḍeguṁ . Ī dharmmakkaḷivaṁ bagedātaṁ vāraṇāsiku
rukṣētradoḷu kavileyma brāhmaṇarumaṁ koṁda mahāpātakamakku . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ saṣṭi
rvvarśasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi[ḥ .*] . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētunripaṁṇa kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvā
tānbhāginaṟpārtthivēndrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.206 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
